data.models.py:
"""Domain models for Organization Service — ALL Pydantic request/response models"""

from datetime import datetime, timezone
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any, List
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Enumerations / valid values
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

VALID_UNIT_TYPES = [
    "company", "legal_entity", "division", "business_unit",
    "department", "cost_center", "team", "region", "site", "profit_center", "shared_services",
]
VALID_DECISIONS = ["allow", "deny", "escalate", "threshold"]
VALID_THRESHOLD_TYPES = ["amount", "percentage"]
VALID_DELEGATION_STATUSES = ["active", "revoked", "expired"]
VALID_AUDIT_ACTIONS = [
    "created", "updated", "deleted", "moved", "assigned",
    "unassigned", "delegated", "revoked",
]


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Org Unit models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class OrgUnitCreate(BaseModel):
    name: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=255)
    unit_type: str = Field(..., description="One of: company, legal_entity, division, business_unit, department, cost_center, team, region, site, profit_center, shared_services")
    parent_id: Optional[str] = None
    legal_entity_id: Optional[str] = None
    code: Optional[str] = None
    description: Optional[str] = None
    headcount: int = 0
    sort_order: int = 0
    registration_number: Optional[str] = None
    jurisdiction: Optional[str] = None
    address: Optional[str] = None
    metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=dict)


class OrgUnitUpdate(BaseModel):
    name: Optional[str] = Field(None, min_length=1, max_length=255)
    unit_type: Optional[str] = None
    parent_id: Optional[str] = None
    legal_entity_id: Optional[str] = None
    code: Optional[str] = None
    description: Optional[str] = None
    headcount: Optional[int] = None
    sort_order: Optional[int] = None
    is_active: Optional[bool] = None
    registration_number: Optional[str] = None
    jurisdiction: Optional[str] = None
    address: Optional[str] = None
    metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None


class ManagerInfo(BaseModel):
    user_id: Optional[str] = None
    name: Optional[str] = None
    position: Optional[str] = None


class OrgUnitResponse(BaseModel):
    id: str
    tenant_id: str
    name: str
    unit_type: str
    parent_id: Optional[str] = None
    legal_entity_id: Optional[str] = None
    code: Optional[str] = None
    description: Optional[str] = None
    headcount: int = 0
    sort_order: int = 0
    is_active: bool = True
    registration_number: Optional[str] = None
    jurisdiction: Optional[str] = None
    address: Optional[str] = None
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = {}
    created_at: str = ""
    updated_at: str = ""
    created_by: str = ""
    updated_by: str = ""


class OrgUnitTreeNode(BaseModel):
    id: str
    name: str
    unit_type: str
    code: Optional[str] = None
    headcount: int = 0
    is_active: bool = True
    manager: Optional[ManagerInfo] = None
    children: List["OrgUnitTreeNode"] = []


OrgUnitTreeNode.model_rebuild()


class OrgUnitListResponse(BaseModel):
    items: List[OrgUnitResponse]
    total: int
    page: int
    page_size: int


class OrgUnitMember(BaseModel):
    user_id: str
    user_name: Optional[str] = None
    user_email: Optional[str] = None
    position_id: str
    position_title: str
    is_primary: bool = True
    start_date: str = ""
    end_date: Optional[str] = None

class PositionCreate(BaseModel):

    title: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=255)
    code: Optional[str] = None

    reports_to_position_id: Optional[str] = None

class MandateRuleCreate(BaseModel):

    max_threshold: Optional[float] = None
    currency: str = "EUR"
    threshold_multiplier: Optional[str] = None
    percentage_value: Optional[float] = None
    allow_currency_equivalent: bool = False
    escalate_to_role_id: Optional[str] = None
    requires_four_eyes: bool = False
    approval_chain_level: int = 1
    is_override: bool = False
    notes: Optional[str] = None

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helpers to convert DB documents to responses
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def _coerce_address(address: Any) -> Optional[str]:
    """Coerce address to string — handles both str and dict formats."""
    if address is None:
        return None
    if isinstance(address, str):
        return address
    if isinstance(address, dict):
        parts = [address.get(k) for k in ("street", "city", "state", "postal_code", "country") if address.get(k)]
        return ", ".join(parts) if parts else None
    return str(address)


def doc_to_org_unit(doc: Dict[str, Any]) -> OrgUnitResponse:
    return OrgUnitResponse(
        id=doc.get("_key", doc.get("id", "")),
        tenant_id=doc.get("tenant_id", ""),
        name=doc.get("name", ""),
        unit_type=doc.get("unit_type", "department"),
        parent_id=doc.get("parent_id"),
        legal_entity_id=doc.get("legal_entity_id"),
        code=doc.get("code"),
        description=doc.get("description"),
        headcount=doc.get("headcount", 0),
        sort_order=doc.get("sort_order", 0),
        is_active=doc.get("is_active", True),
        registration_number=doc.get("registration_number"),
        jurisdiction=doc.get("jurisdiction"),
        address=_coerce_address(doc.get("address")),
        metadata=doc.get("metadata", {}),
        created_at=doc.get("created_at", ""),
        updated_at=doc.get("updated_at", ""),
        created_by=doc.get("created_by", ""),
        updated_by=doc.get("updated_by", ""),
    )


def doc_to_position(doc: Dict[str, Any]) -> PositionResponse:
    holder = doc.get("current_holder")
    current_holder = None
    if holder:
        current_holder = CurrentHolder(
            assignment_id=holder.get("assignment_id") or "",
            user_id=holder.get("user_id") or "",
            user_name=holder.get("user_name"),
            is_primary=holder.get("is_primary", True),
            start_date=holder.get("start_date", ""),
            end_date=holder.get("end_date"),
        )
    return PositionResponse(
        id=doc.get("_key", doc.get("id", "")),
        tenant_id=doc.get("tenant_id", ""),
        org_unit_id=doc.get("org_unit_id", ""),
        title=doc.get("title", ""),
        code=doc.get("code"),
        role=doc.get("role"),
        reports_to_position_id=doc.get("reports_to_position_id"),
        is_active=doc.get("is_active", True),
        metadata=doc.get("metadata", {}),
        created_at=doc.get("created_at", ""),
        updated_at=doc.get("updated_at", ""),
        current_holder=current_holder,
        status=doc.get("status", "vacant" if not holder else "active"),
    )

def doc_to_legal_entity(doc: Dict[str, Any], parent_name: Optional[str] = None) -> LegalEntityResponse:
    """Convert org_units doc (where unit_type in company/legal_entity) to legacy LegalEntityResponse."""
    return LegalEntityResponse(
        id=doc.get("_key", doc.get("id", "")),
        name=doc.get("name", ""),
        type=doc.get("unit_type", "company"),
        registrationNumber=doc.get("registration_number"),
        jurisdiction=doc.get("jurisdiction"),
        status="active" if doc.get("is_active", True) else "inactive",
        parentId=doc.get("parent_id"),
        parentName=parent_name,
        address=_coerce_address(doc.get("address")),
        createdAt=doc.get("created_at", ""),
        updatedAt=doc.get("updated_at", ""),
    )

from datetime import datetime, timezone
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any, List
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

VALID_UNIT_TYPES = [
    "company", "legal_entity", "division", "business_unit",
    "department", "cost_center", "team", "region", "site", "profit_center", "shared_services",
]
VALID_DECISIONS = ["allow", "deny", "escalate", "threshold"]
VALID_THRESHOLD_TYPES = ["amount", "percentage"]
VALID_DELEGATION_STATUSES = ["active", "revoked", "expired"]
VALID_AUDIT_ACTIONS = [
    "created", "updated", "deleted", "moved", "assigned",
    "unassigned", "delegated", "revoked",
]

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helpers to convert DB documents to responses
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def _coerce_address(address: Any) -> Optional[str]:
    """Coerce address to string — handles both str and dict formats."""
    if address is None:
        return None
    if isinstance(address, str):
        return address
    if isinstance(address, dict):
        parts = [address.get(k) for k in ("street", "city", "state", "postal_code", "country") if address.get(k)]
        return ", ".join(parts) if parts else None
    return str(address)


def doc_to_org_unit(doc: Dict[str, Any]) -> OrgUnitResponse:
    return OrgUnitResponse(
        id=doc.get("_key", doc.get("id", "")),
        tenant_id=doc.get("tenant_id", ""),
        name=doc.get("name", ""),
        unit_type=doc.get("unit_type", "department"),
        parent_id=doc.get("parent_id"),
        legal_entity_id=doc.get("legal_entity_id"),
        code=doc.get("code"),
        description=doc.get("description"),
        headcount=doc.get("headcount", 0),
        sort_order=doc.get("sort_order", 0),
        is_active=doc.get("is_active", True),
        registration_number=doc.get("registration_number"),
        jurisdiction=doc.get("jurisdiction"),
        address=_coerce_address(doc.get("address")),
        metadata=doc.get("metadata", {}),
        created_at=doc.get("created_at", ""),
        updated_at=doc.get("updated_at", ""),
        created_by=doc.get("created_by", ""),
        updated_by=doc.get("updated_by", ""),
    )


def doc_to_position(doc: Dict[str, Any]) -> PositionResponse:
    holder = doc.get("current_holder")
    current_holder = None
    if holder:
        current_holder = CurrentHolder(
            assignment_id=holder.get("assignment_id") or "",
            user_id=holder.get("user_id") or "",
            user_name=holder.get("user_name"),
            is_primary=holder.get("is_primary", True),
            start_date=holder.get("start_date", ""),
            end_date=holder.get("end_date"),
        )
    return PositionResponse(
        id=doc.get("_key", doc.get("id", "")),
        tenant_id=doc.get("tenant_id", ""),
        org_unit_id=doc.get("org_unit_id", ""),
        title=doc.get("title", ""),
        code=doc.get("code"),
        role=doc.get("role"),
        reports_to_position_id=doc.get("reports_to_position_id"),
        is_active=doc.get("is_active", True),
        metadata=doc.get("metadata", {}),
        created_at=doc.get("created_at", ""),
        updated_at=doc.get("updated_at", ""),
        current_holder=current_holder,
        status=doc.get("status", "vacant" if not holder else "active"),
    )

    return AssignmentResponse(

def doc_to_role(doc: Dict[str, Any]) -> RoleResponse:
    return RoleResponse(
        id=doc.get("_key", doc.get("id", "")),
        tenant_id=doc.get("tenant_id", ""),
        name=doc.get("name", ""),
        description=doc.get("description"),
        permissions=doc.get("permissions", []),
        inherits_from=doc.get("inherits_from"),
        is_active=doc.get("is_active", True),
        member_count=doc.get("member_count", 0),
        created_at=doc.get("created_at", ""),
        updated_at=doc.get("updated_at", ""),
        created_by=doc.get("created_by", ""),
    )


def doc_to_legal_entity(doc: Dict[str, Any], parent_name: Optional[str] = None) -> LegalEntityResponse:
    """Convert org_units doc (where unit_type in company/legal_entity) to legacy LegalEntityResponse."""
    return LegalEntityResponse(
        id=doc.get("_key", doc.get("id", "")),
        name=doc.get("name", ""),
        type=doc.get("unit_type", "company"),
        registrationNumber=doc.get("registration_number"),
        jurisdiction=doc.get("jurisdiction"),
        status="active" if doc.get("is_active", True) else "inactive",
        parentId=doc.get("parent_id"),
        parentName=parent_name,
        address=_coerce_address(doc.get("address")),
        createdAt=doc.get("created_at", ""),
        updatedAt=doc.get("updated_at", ""),
    )
"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"org-models-fix","namespace":"dev-ben"}}
